creator: billf@jade.chc-chimes.com
text:
This port is not packaging on my machine right now.

FreeBSD phear.123.net 2.2.8-STABLE FreeBSD 2.2.8-STABLE #0: Sat Jan 30
11:32:43 EST 1999     billf@phear.123.net:/usr/src/sys/compile/PHEAR  i386

I don't believe this is related to my machine being 2.2.x, though.

Either 
(1) I can fix it
or
(2) Someone else can fix it :>

The latter will almost surely have a quicker turnaround time.

- bill fumerola - billf@chc-chimes.com - BF1560 - computer horizons corp -
- ph:(800) 252-2421 - bfumerol@computerhorizons.com - billf@FreeBSD.org  -
